home.title: Tokensense-Ai | Contador de Tokens LLM Gratis y Calculadora de Costos
home.description: Calcule los costos de los prompts de IA al instante. Estime el uso de tokens y el precio de la API para GPT-5, Claude 3.5 y Gemini. 100% del lado del cliente, privado y sin necesidad de registrarse.
home.keywords: contador de tokens LLM, calculadora de costos de prompt, precios de GPT-5, herramientas para desarrolladores de IA, recuento de tokens de Claude, costo de la API de Gemini
home.og_title: Tokensense-Ai | Calculadora de Costos de Prompts de IA
home.og_description: Conozca sus costos de API antes de enviar. Recuento de tokens 100% privado y del lado del cliente.
home.twitter_title: Tokensense-Ai | Calculadora de Tokens y Costos de LLM
home.twitter_description: Estimaciones de costos instantáneas para prompts de GPT, Claude y Gemini.

hero.badge: La única calculadora que simula costos de bucles de agente
hero.subheadline: Conoce el conteo de tokens y precios de GPT-4o, Claude 3.5, Gemini 1.5 y 50+ modelos antes de enviar.

calculator.compress_basic_desc: Elimina espacios y saltos de línea. Minifica JSON. Muy seguro.
calculator.compress_advanced_desc: Elimina estructura Markdown y comentarios. Revisa el resultado.
calculator.updates_realtime: Las estimaciones se actualizan en tiempo real

model_picker.placeholder: Selecciona un modelo para ver el costo →

compare.title: Modo Comparación
compare.step_label: PASO 02 — Compara tu modelo con 30+ opciones
compare.step_desc: Agrega modelos para ver costos lado a lado para el mismo prompt.
compare.enter_prompt: Ingresa un prompt para ver la comparación de costos.

smart_routing.title: Enrutamiento Inteligente
smart_routing.desc: ¿Quieres ejecutarlo {multiplier}x más barato? Este prompt encaja en {model}.

shell.title: Video Token Budget Planner
shell.description: Estimate and compare AI video processing costs across providers.
shell.no_video_description: Upload a file or paste a URL on the left to start planning your token budget and comparing provider costs.
shell.privacy_description: Tokensense is a client-side tool. Your video data is processed locally in your browser for file uploads. API keys are stored in your browser's localStorage and are never sent to our servers. External URL analysis is performed via a secure proxy that does not store your content.
shell.methodology_description: Estimates are based on published tokenization rates for Gemini, Claude, and GPT-4o models. Actual costs may vary slightly based on specific prompt overhead and provider-side adjustments.

input.upload_description: Drag and drop or click to browse
input.url_placeholder: Paste YouTube, Vimeo, or direct video link...

config.title: Parameters
config.sampling_hint: Higher FPS increases visual detail but significantly increases token cost.
config.sampling_recommendation: 1 FPS is recommended for most tasks.

results.title: Analysis Results
results.pricing_disclaimer: Pricing last updated: March 2026. Includes input tokens only. Output costs vary by response length.

keys.title: API Keys
keys.privacy_description: Keys are saved in your browser's localStorage only. They are never sent to our servers. All provider calls happen directly from your browser.
keys.clear_all_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear all saved API keys?
keys.exact_measure_hint: Connect a key to enable Exact Measurement mode.
